# SCADARPI Doxygen Theme

This folder vendors the same Doxygen theme stack used in `zCm` (`zCommon` docs):

- `doxygen-awesome.css`
- `doxygen-awesome-sidebar-only.css`
- `zcm-awesome.css` (project visual layer)

Upstream base theme:
- https://github.com/jothepro/doxygen-awesome-css

License:
- MIT (`LICENSE`)
